exercises.code:
def bad_add(item, bucket=[]):
    bucket.append(item)
    return bucket

def good_add(item, bucket=None):
    if bucket is None:
        bucket = []
    bucket.append(item)
    return bucket

print("bad", bad_add(1), bad_add(2))
print("good", good_add(1), good_add(2))

exercises.code:
def normalize_nombre(raw: str) -> str:
    """Post: sin espacios extremos; espacios internos colapsados."""
    return " ".join(raw.strip().split())

out = normalize_nombre("  Ana  María  ")
assert out == out.strip()
assert "  " not in out
print(out)

exercises.code:
def normalize_email(raw: str) -> str:
    # raise ValueError: el caller no puede continuar con email basura
    s = raw.strip().lower()
    if s.count("@") != 1:
        raise ValueError("email inválido")
    local, domain = s.split("@")
    if not local or not domain:
        raise ValueError("email inválido")
    return s

print(normalize_email("a@b.com"))
print("política: raise en normalizador puro; tupla en parsers batch con cuarentena")

exercises.code:
def normalize_tel(raw):
    return "".join(c for c in raw if c.isdigit())

x = normalize_tel("(51) 999")
print(x)
print(normalize_tel(x))  # idempotente
print("idempotent", normalize_tel(x) == x)

exercises.code:
def make_multiplier(k):
    def mul(n):
        return n * k
    return mul

m3 = make_multiplier(3)
m5 = make_multiplier(5)
print(m3(4), m5(4))
